_note: Abbreviated — see office-open-plan/output.json for full schema

rationale.chat_summary: Warehouse highbay — 600 m² at 7 m mounting height. Target 200 lx achieved at 215 lx with industrial-dusty MF=0.60 (LSF and LMF degraded for dusty environment). IP65 luminaires specified. Reply to refine, e.g. 'specify 5000 K cool white'.

sections.title: Illumination
sections.summary: Target 200 lx (warehouse low-bay general); 215 lx achieved.

decisions.label: Lux target 200 lx
decisions.summary: BS EN 12464-1 sets 200 lx for warehouse general activity.
decisions.rule: BS EN 12464-1 Table 5.3 entry for warehouse

sections.title: Layout
sections.summary: Highbay grid with 7 m mounting; spacing-to-mounting-height ratio respected.

sections.title: Circuits
sections.summary: Multi-circuit split required given the area and 80 % MCB rule; each circuit feeds a contiguous bay.

sections.title: IP + environment
sections.summary: Industrial dusty environment — IP65 luminaires specified; MF reduced for dusty deposit.

decisions.label: IP65 required
decisions.summary: Dusty environment per BS 7671 Section 522.5; IP65 protects against ingress and water washdown.
decisions.rule: BS 7671 Section 522.5 (external influence AE — solid object protection)

decisions.label: MF = 0.60 (industrial dusty)
decisions.summary: LSF + LMF degraded for dusty deposit and 1-year cleaning cycle.

sections.title: Assumptions
sections.summary: Photometric data and exact luminaire model to be confirmed at tender; UF assumed from highbay narrow-beam standard photometry.

decisions.label: UF assumed from standard highbay narrow-beam
decisions.summary: Final UF must be confirmed against the selected luminaire's photometric file.
